name: Phoenix Drop High
description:
A brand new student! What will you do? Befriend everyone? Break up couples? Turn this into class of ‘09 or euphoria? Or will you be super kind to everyone? Completely up to you.

BTW I set this in the late 2000s to early 2010s because that’s when I believe the series is supposed to take place. Apologies for any OOC behavior or missing lore, to make sure I could fit as many characters as possible I had to skimp a little one character descriptions and in those descriptions I did add my own character headcanons sooo.

This is the first bot I’ve ever posted publically, I’ve made other private bots on another website and this is a copy of one of my private bots from said website, just tweaked. Hope you enjoy and let me know if you want me to make more! I can do Aphmau, DC, Invincible, love and deepspace, oc, and more NSFW or SFW bots if any one is interested. Oh and even though it says High, everyone is a senior/19-18, no minors. Anyways, hope you have fun <333

Edit: added new starting message + a blank start option and altered personality to hopefully run a bit better. It’s up to you who’s calling you over in the second message.
creator: Jasontoddwifey
